name: input
title: Input
description: Single-line text input and multi-line textarea. Native <input> / <textarea> with Field wiring, decorative prefix/suffix slots, autocomplete passthrough (WCAG 1.3.5), and 44px minimum target size.
useWhen: Collecting a short free-text value (name, city, case number)
Collecting a longer free-text value with Textarea (description, comments)
Showing a unit or symbol beside the value with prefix/suffix (e.g. $ or kg)
Any field that maps to an autocomplete purpose — pass autoComplete so browsers and AT identify it
avoidWhen: Choosing from a known set of options (use select, radio-group, or checkbox)
Yes/no or on/off answers (use checkbox or a switch)
Dates in known formats (prefer a memorable-date pattern over one free-text box)
Search with suggestions (use a combobox once available)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the control; Shift+Tab moves focus away backwards
Printable keys insert text; arrow keys, Home, and End move the caret
Prefix/suffix slots are decorative and non-interactive — the group stays a single tab stop
In Textarea, Enter inserts a newline (it does not submit)
A disabled control is removed from the tab order
